name: Easy Turkey Sloppy Joes
recipeIngredient: 4 Large hamburger rolls or -rolls of your choice, split
recipeInstructions:
1. Either use a non-stick skillet or spray a skillet with non-stick spray. Add ground turkey and onion, and cook until meat is no longer pink.
2. Add other ingredients (ketchup, Dijon mustard, seasoning salt, garlic powder), and simmer until thickened to your choosing.
3. Serve as you would sloppy joes, on split rolls. Enjoy this good, easy, quick, and low-calorie meal!
